architectReview.evidence: Architecture: distribution boundary honored — esbuild bundle externalizes cloakbrowser/playwright-core, preserves the runtime dynamic import, and ships a single-shebang npx-able dist that handshakes 15 tools. register.mjs renders single-stdio-server registration for all 8 targets mirroring engine/mcp-config.mjs (which stays the EXTERNAL @playwright/mcp setup helper). SKILL.md routes to the server as the primary live surface while cli.mjs live is retained (tests + docs depend on it). Product: all supported clients get a registration snippet; ci is green including the mcp tests. Code: pre-existing lint errors fixed behavior-preservingly (ASCII check + if/else); SKILL.md mirrored byte-for-byte across all 4 skill roots (validate fails closed on drift).
commands: leader architect review over G006 changeset (register.mjs, dist build fix, SKILL.md + mirrors, ci wiring, scripts lint fixes)

executorQa.evidence: npm run ci is fully green (exit 0): validate + lint(0 errors) + format + test(e2e 5 + engine 374) + engine:validate + mcp:test(45). dist server rebuilt and proven to handshake over stdio (15 tools). All 8 client registrations render; unsupported client rejected; SKILL.md mirror parity enforced.

iteration.evidence: Leader ai-slop-cleaner sweep on the G006 changeset caught a real distribution bug (bundled dist had two shebangs -> invalid ESM start) and fixed it (removed the source shebang, banner supplies the dist shebang). Lint fixes are behavior-preserving (ASCII check verified true/false; if/else identical to ternary). No fallback masking, no duplication, no dead code. Full ci rerun clean (exit 0).
